programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: The Mistery of the Mischievous Mind Reader
programme.desc: When Donnie, the obnoxious class semi-bully seems to have developed psychic powers, Addison has to figure out how he's doing it and stop him from intimidating the other kids.

programme.title: The Little Things
programme.desc: When the kids lose a toy, Yoko shrinks them down to toy size so they can find it!

programme.title: Cloudy Day
programme.desc: Chaos erupts in the park when Yoko turns clouds into real animals, and the kids must plan how to return things to normal!

programme.title: Thaumatrope
programme.desc: How do you make 2 pictures blend into 1? We'll show you how with this optical illusion that'll put you in a spin!

programme.title: Bum Power
programme.desc: The doctors make Billy Bones his very own bum and reveal the power of your gluteus maximus muscle! Meanwhile, Felix comes into the emergency department with a cut eye, and Asia has an injured foot.

programme.title: Time to Say Goodbye
programme.desc: It's the last day at vet school for the Junior Vets. They faced their fears, overcame anxieties, and, most importantly, they helped all sorts of animals, pets, and critters.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Cloudy Day
programme.desc: Chaos erupts in the park when Yoko turns clouds into real animals, and the kids must plan how to return things to normal!

programme.title: Thaumatrope
programme.desc: How do you make 2 pictures blend into 1? We'll show you how with this optical illusion that'll put you in a spin!

programme.title: The Mistery of the Mischievous Mind Reader
programme.desc: When Donnie, the obnoxious class semi-bully seems to have developed psychic powers, Addison has to figure out how he's doing it and stop him from intimidating the other kids.

programme.title: Troubadours and Minstrels
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Singers and musicians of that era travel round Europe singing their poetry. Famous minstrel Howler is a huge hit at a fiery banquet in his lordship's court.

programme.title: Wrist Concert Lights
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents wristband lights and a multifunction travel jacket with a pocket for everything. She visits a Girls App Camp teaching tech and meets the inventor of an easy way to check for a sore throat.

programme.title: Brave Orangutan
programme.desc: Someone is destroying large areas of the local jungle in Borneo, chasing away a group of orangutans from their natural habitat. One very brave orangutan is trying to fight against the bulldozers. But he won't last long without the MeteoHeroes' help!

programme.title: Soapy Sailing
programme.desc: Eric makes a model boat using soap as fuel. The boat moves because the soap breaks the surface tension of the water, causing the water molecules to repel each other and push each other backwards into the boat.

programme.title: When The Going Gets Tough
programme.desc: There is a week to go until the British Championships, and the Rhythmic team struggles to learn a complicated new routine for the competition. But a surprise visit from a Rhythmic celebrity goes a long way to lift the girls' spirits.

programme.title: Eye Gunk
programme.desc: In this episode, the doctors put eye boogers under the microscope and show you how to make edible eye gunk!

programme.title: That's So Twisted
programme.desc: In this episode we divide a standard Mobius strip into thirds. As we cut the twisty strip into three pieces, three interlocked rings appear. The magic? None of them has a twist! How is this possible?

programme.title: Breaking Free
programme.desc: Joe, Olly, and Oscar got inspired by the gym vloggers and decided to create their own Free-G video to post online. Madi has many challenges to overcome as she sets off for her first British Gymnastics residential training camp.

programme.title: Roger Has A Problem
programme.desc: In today's episode, Roger, the dog, has eaten a tennis ball. Will he feel bouncier after an operation to remove it? Also, a pony has a hurt hoof, and there is a pig who thinks he's a dog! And Johnny and Inel find out how to help a constipated guinea pig.

programme.title: Environmental Engineers
programme.desc: Philippe learns about salmon migration, and new technology that helps in the speedy replacement of bridges. He visits a hurricane protection facility and goes to Mexico to discover the secrets of Mayan symbols.

programme.title: Time to Say Goodbye
programme.desc: It's the last day at vet school for the Junior Vets. They faced their fears, overcame anxieties, and, most importantly, they helped all sorts of animals, pets, and critters.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.desc: In today's episode, Roger, the dog, has eaten a tennis ball. Will he feel bouncier after an operation to remove it? Also, a pony has a hurt hoof, and there is a pig who thinks he's a dog! And Johnny and Inel find out how to help a constipated guinea pig.

programme.desc: Gesine Prado grills pizza, cake and more while hosting a party celebrating warm weather and friends.

programme.desc: Bobby and Sophie Flay visit their favorite spots for lobster in NYC, with a few snacks in between.

programme.desc: Gesine Prado bakes over an open flame while helping a park ranger friend move into her station.

programme.title: E217 - Grave Danger
programme.desc: When Ray starts behaving strangely, Henry and Charlotte investigate and are surprised to discover what's been causing it.

programme.title: E118 - The Patterfly Effect / A Space Affair to Remember
programme.desc: Patrick messes with the space-time continuum. // While Cecil and Bunny celebrate their anniversary in outer space, Patrick and Squidina throw a house party.

programme.title: E208 - Love is in the Lair
programme.desc: Mrs. Wong visits Secret Shores, and threatens to reveal the Thundermans' superhero identities to the town. But Max and Phoebe's plan to have Dr. Colosso keep her quiet backfires in ways they could not have imagined.

programme.title: E206 - The Rejects
programme.desc: When Leo, Mikey, and Raph are captured by the mad scientist Jordan Perry and his Monster Mutanimals, Donnie must stop a mutant invasion on Staten Island and save everyone from the terrifying creation known as Mutant Omega!

programme.title: E230 - High Sea Diving / Bottle Burglars
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean! // When SpongeBob and Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, it's up to them to steal it back!

programme.title: E410 - A Grave Mistake / Leader of the Rack
programme.desc: Lucy faces off against her friend Haiku to become the new president of the Young Morticians' Club at school. // Leni is promoted to temporary manager at work, but she worries about remaining good friends with Miguel and Fiona.

programme.title: E199 - Sold! / Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away - much to Squidward’s delight. // When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: E213 - The Loudest Mission: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Bobby fits in great but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives. Little do they know, their mother has a secret motive.

programme.title: E108 - LAD / Before 10AM
programme.desc: Determined to learn the truth about Jack's secret morning life, Lily does the unthinkable and wakes up early. But her sleuthing gets them both in big trouble. // Lil and her BFFs Anusha & Debs fight to win the coveted trophy at Hank N Beans arcade.

programme.title: E219 - Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E209 - The Girl Who Cried Danger
programme.desc: Volt and ShoutOut hatch a plan to stop their super-clinger fan from making false alarm emergency calls.

programme.title: E123 - #MagicATM
programme.desc: Sam notices that Cat has been spending lots of money. When she asks where it's coming from, Cat takes Sam to a 'Magic ATM' that gives her free money. Sam worries that this might not be legal.

programme.title: E101 - Leonardo Stands Alone
programme.desc: The Ninja Turtles are on the run and...alone. Leonardo is a leader but who is he without anyone to lead? Leo now has to stop Bishop and her Mechazoids while trying to save his brothers.

programme.title: E111 - Tide and Prejudice
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.desc: Leni is promoted to temporary manager at work, but she worries about remaining good friends with Miguel and Fiona.

programme.title: Ethiopia's Electric Vehicle Revolution
programme.desc: Electric buses and taxis are reshaping transport in Addis Ababa. Plus: In South Africa, how invasive biomass is transformed into low‑carbon bricks and new jobs.

programme.title: Nietzsche Explained: Why A 19Th Century Rebel Feels So Gen Z
programme.desc: Nietzsche Explained: from 'God is dead” to the Ubermensch, hype culture and Kanye West. More than 125 years after his death, Friedrich Nietzsche has become a surprising icon for Gen Z and Gen Alpha. His sharp critiques of morality, religion, and society feel uncannily modern in an age of social media, burnout, and constant self-optimization.

E1 - Malaysia Ggk
programme.desc: From a Tarzan assault course towering 10m above ground to a 160km forced march, recruits of Malaysian Army Special Forces unit, Grup Gerak Khas, are pushed to their limits to earn the coveted Green Beret.

programme.title: E601 - Big Apple Rick
programme.desc: Rick's in the big apple to see if he can compute a deal on a rare piece of tech. Will this enticing piece lure Rick in? A seller brings a special edition Stan Lee Funko Pop. Will Corey make a super deal?

programme.desc: From Furbys to Pogs, the 1990s were full of unforgettable fad toys! It was a decade where old-school toys like Beanie Babies went head-to-head with high-tech wonders like Tamagotchi.

programme.title: E9 - Beat The Judges: Machete Master
programme.desc: Tasked with making an intricate Vaquero Machete, will this former champion have the skills to prove they have what it takes to Beat the Judges?

programme.title: E226 - Aliens In Our Airspace
programme.desc: Terrifying encounters at 40,000 feet. Pilot accounts of UFOs taking control of their aircraft. Entire jumbo jets disappearing into thin air. Pilots have experienced unexplainable events in the sky.

programme.desc: Terrifying encounters at 40,000 feet. Pilot accounts of UFOs taking control of their aircraft. Entire jumbo jets disappearing into thin air. Pilots have experienced unexplainable events in the sky.

programme.desc: When the Squirrels tell Duggee that they have nothing left to play with, he encourages them to use their imagination.

programme.desc: Sarah and Duck explore a Winter Fair in the park, and discover an amazing skating rink inside a giant snowball!

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E29 - The Harvest Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is getting ready to harvest the ripe crops that grown. The squirrels remember when they planted their seeds, watered them, and left them to grow, and now it's time to help Duggee pick them all.

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E19 - The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.desc: Dog and Pug visit a forest where the witches are planning a great 'spelling' contest. Their friend Witch Willow needs their help.

programme.title: E10 - It's Time To Look At Old Pictures
programme.desc: A photo of Gran Gran and JoJo's mummy when she was a little girl inspires them to take a walk and compare old photos of their neighbourhood to see how it has changed over time.

programme.title: E9 - It's Time To Grow A Flower
programme.desc: JoJo tries to grow a daffodil but is disheartened to learn that it will take a long time to bloom. Cynthia and Gran Gran show JoJo how to take care of it and the best way to measure its growth.

programme.title: E16 - Yoga Ball
programme.desc: Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.desc: It's a space race as Supertato helps Carrot fly her baguette rocket to be the first Veggie on the Cheese Moon but half way there Evil Pea crashes into them making them crash land.

programme.title: E6 - Big Plans, Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mikey talks to a 15-year-old aviation buff in England via Skype, who has discovered that Buffalo’s DC3–WZS–flew on D-Day. This inspires Mikey to do something special for the 70th anniversary. He invites Cory to do a tandem parachute jump and finds out that Cory’s grandfather was a paratrooper at the invasion of Normandy. Meanwhile, Mikey takes mercy on Prefkar, working the ramp in Hay River, and offers him a chance for some pilot training on the morning DC-3 freighter. But when the time comes, Prefkar learns that he’s been bumped for pilot David Alexandre. It gets worse for Prefkar when he’s given another chance and this time the fog rolls in. Prefkar might not stick it out at Buffalo. Mikey’s D-Day plans get even bigger when he contacts the Princess Patricia Canadian Light Infantry, who were part of the Allied airborne forces that dropped behind German lines in 1944. He pitches his plan—a reenactment jump from WZS, an actual D-Day plane. But there’s a hitch: the plane needs to pass in

programme.title: E3 - The Good, The Bad and Terry
programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman’s noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from. We recreate each scene and test the reality of these shots with the weapons that were used.

programme.title: E6 - Big Plans, Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mikey talks to a 15-year-old aviation buff in England via Skype, who has discovered that Buffalo’s DC3–WZS–flew on D-Day. This inspires Mikey to do something special for the 70th anniversary. He invites Cory to do a tandem parachute jump and finds out that Cory’s grandfather was a paratrooper at the invasion of Normandy. Meanwhile, Mikey takes mercy on Prefkar, working the ramp in Hay River, and offers him a chance for some pilot training on the morning DC-3 freighter. But when the time comes, Prefkar learns that he’s been bumped for pilot David Alexandre. It gets worse for Prefkar when he’s given another chance and this time the fog rolls in. Prefkar might not stick it out at Buffalo. Mikey’s D-Day plans get even bigger when he contacts the Princess Patricia Canadian Light Infantry, who were part of the Allied airborne forces that dropped behind German lines in 1944. He pitches his plan—a reenactment jump from WZS, an actual D-Day plane. But there’s a hitch: the plane needs to pass in

programme.title: Top Chef S17E13 -Parma
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: CNBC Sports - Asian Le Mans Series
programme.desc: Created by the Automobile Club de l'Ouest (ACO), the Asian Le Mans Series symbolises the Spirit of Le Mans, holding the same shared passion for creating world class endurance racing in Asia. The Asian Le Mans Series is growing year on year and is attracting some of the world's most successful endurance racing teams, as well as fostering new and emerging talent from the region.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: E1 - The Villainess And Working Out

programme.desc: Melissa Mackay presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.

programme.title: Legacy Of Rage
programme.desc: Brandon Ma, a regular guy working in Hong Kong, who is set up by his drug-dealing best friend Michael, to take the rap for the murder of an undercover cop. Michael also has eyes for Brandon's girl, May. While Brandon languishes in jail, May gives birth to their child and flees to Brazil to avoid the lurid clutches of Michael, who has become a big crime boss. Brandon gets out of prison after eight years, learns the truth, and goes after Michael for revenge...

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

programme.title: E3 - Siblings Month: Creative Play Fun!
programme.desc: Get creative with JJ & his siblings! TomTom leads his lab assistants JJ & YoYo in fun science experiments, like making slime & a volcano! Then, YoYo teaches JJ how to make the perfect peanut butter & jelly sandwich. The creative fun continues as they record cool sounds with a cassette player, pretend to be a train & play a game of 'The Floor is Lava' in the living room! It's a month of imagination & creativity!

programme.title: E3 - Baby John's Big World Adventure!
programme.desc: Join Baby John on a big world adventure! First, he & his friends explore the reptile zoo to learn all about the scaly creatures. Then, it's time to learn about bugs at the insect park! The adventure gets out of this world as Jack, Jill & Baby John explore a new adventure: space camp! They learn how to be an astronaut & visit other planets as they fly a rocket ship & train in zero gravity!

programme.title: E6 - Let's Learn to Be Healthy!
programme.desc: Let's learn how to be healthy with Baby John! He learns all about the bones that make up his body when he visits the doctor & his friend 'Mr. Skeleton'! Then, after tripping & falling while playing soccer, Baby John learns the tough task of tying his own shoelaces! The health lessons continue as Mom & Dad teach him how to properly sneeze into his arm to keep everyone around him from getting sick.

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E5 - Baby John's Big Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some big outdoor adventures with Baby John! First, Dad makes sure the family is prepared with the proper clothes, first aid & food. Then, the family enters a sandcastle competition, where Baby John, Jack & Jill work together to build a giant sand turtle! The fun continues as the family goes camping, but nighttime is a little scary! Mom & Dad show the kids there's nothing to be afraid of, especially with the beautiful stars to look at!

programme.title: E3 - Siblings Month: Creative Play Fun!
programme.desc: Get creative with JJ & his siblings! TomTom leads his lab assistants JJ & YoYo in fun science experiments, like making slime & a volcano! Then, YoYo teaches JJ how to make the perfect peanut butter & jelly sandwich. programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!

programme.title: Tokyo Revengers 2 : Bloody Halloween-Destiny
programme.desc: “I'll save you! Over and over! I'll never give up until I find a future where you're still alive!” Takemichi thought he had saved his ex-girlfriend Hinata...but once again, she was killed by the Tokyo Manji Gang, an organization that had grown violent and corrupt. This time, she was killed right in front of his eyes... The key to saving Hinata was linked to a tragic event that had torn apart the six founding members of Tokyo Manji... Six best friends who swore to die for one another. Why did they turn against each other? The epic battle on Halloween, October 31, would pit best friends against each other and threaten to destroy the Tokyo Manji Gang.

programme.title: Adventure of The King
programme.desc: Emperor Zhengde of the Ming Dynasty is young and playful, privately escapes from Palace to avoid the appointed marriage. He loses his memory by accident and luckily comes across Ms. Li to take care him. Prince Ningxia takes this opportunity to rebel the kingdom and catch the emperor to execute him immediately at the execution ground. At a critical time, three entourages rescue the Emperor and the prince Ningxia is arrested. However, Ms Li has refused to get marriage with the emperor due to his cheating on her love feelings.

programme.title: The Monkey King 2
programme.desc: 500 years after the havoc in heaven, Xuanzang, the Tang Priest, is appointed by the Buddha to go to the West to fetch the Buddhist scriptures. By accident, Xuangzang undoes the Buddha's spell on Sun Wukong, the Monkey King. Wukong brought under control by a gold hoop given by the Mercy Goddess. He has no choice but to accept the mission to escort Xuanzang to the West. Despite his reluctance. Wukong cuts paths all the way and dutifully helps to subdue Bajie and Sha. But the hoop on this head, effective with his master's restrictive incantation, always remains a vexation for Wukong. Lady White Bone Spirit from the White Tiger Ridge aims to kill and eat Xuanzang's golden body for evading her doom of reincarnation from a demon to any other creature. After dealing with the four, White Bone Spirit has an insight into the barrier between Wukong and Xuanzang. So, she designs traps to foment discord between them. Humiliated mistakenly, Wukong still fights on with both strength and wit

programme.title: E8 - Paname Plays With Stereotypes
programme.desc: Elegant, romantic, grumpy, always in a hurry: Parisians have quite a reputation. The Paris 2024 Olympic Games have changed the world's perception of the capital-turns out it's not that dirty, and its residents are rather welcoming! Today, which cliches still stick to their skin?

programme.title: E9 - Shopping When You Are Visually Impaired?
programme.desc: Visually impaired individuals often encounter difficulties shopping, even online. Websites and stores are far too often poorly adapted to their condition. Also covered: antibiotics and farm animals; orange juice; ravioli for dessert.

programme.title: E33 - Chevilly - Chamerolles
programme.desc: Near Orleans, the Chevilly castle reveals its elegant silhouette in the natural region of Beauce. Between the Middle Ages and the Renaissance, luxurious baths and captivating fragrances... At the Chamerolles castle, history blends with the scents of the 18th century.

programme.title: E3 - Unusual Museums

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Heart World Season 2
programme.desc: In this limited series, Heart takes viewers deeper into her world-sharing her life, style, successes, failures, challenges, and the emotional lessons learned along the way.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E15 - Moniri M'bae (Madagascar)
programme.desc: Born in Antananarivo to Comorian parents, Moniri M'Bae grows up in Reunion Island, where he develops his passion for drawing. Trained at the Beaux-Arts, he publishes his first comics in ''Le Cri du Margouillat''. Today, he continues to create works inspired by his Creole culture.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E2 - Namib: Land Of Extremes
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can. From the sidewinding adder to the fog-collecting beetle, each animal has their tricks for survival in the Namib.

programme.title: E4 - Crowded Islands
programme.desc: On rocky islands off the coast of South Africa, thousands of creatures congregate to breed. Among these, huge colonies of cape gannets dominate. Surrounded by rich waters, they can find enough to feed themselves and their young. But life is full of challenges for the breeding gannets...

programme.title: E5 - Return to the Wild
programme.desc: The Eastern Cape Province is investing heavily in ecotourism and conservation as an alternative to fishing and commercial development. The region is reclaiming farmlands and closing fishing grounds for wildlife. This is one of the most exciting conservation success stories in Africa.

programme.title: E2 - Slammin' Salmon
programme.desc: Join the frantic dash to cash in on July’s salmon run with the Stage 1 winners and some tough new recruits. Tag along on BigBoi's food-finding road trip, welcome QuadMom and RedBack to the feast, and see if BoldFace can keep her surviving cub safe.

programme.title: E1 - The Woodland Troop
programme.desc: In this small patch of woodland, two young monkeys face the toughest time of their lives. As they find their place in the world, they must learn which neighbors are allies, and which are foes. Who to trust, and who to avoid. They will suffer loss, and gain friends, as they discover what it means to be part of the Woodland Troop.

programme.title: E3 - Choices
programme.desc: Learn how Ningaloo’s conservation miracle could inspire humans to pull the planet back from the brink of climatic destruction. Visit an abandoned whaling station and other ruins that show we have the tools, if only we can find the will to change.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 謝盈萱等原班人馬回歸出演，天心加盟飾演新角色。 40歲的陳嘉玲從天龍國回到家鄉台南，展開人生下半場。第一件要努力的事就是靠自己的雙手，把買下的鬼屋變成家。但一開始就發生一連串意外，摔傷、被蜜蜂叮，還坐輪椅進了醫院……新的一季看陳嘉玲如何用盡全力，開始書寫另一段人生篇章。

programme.desc: Gina Goetter is the CFO and COO of Hasbro. She's the architect of the company's transformation, diversifying its manufacturing footprint and investing in Hasbro's video game ambitions.
